sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, make_date(2023, 10, 31));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = make_date(2024, 1, 1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > make_date(2023, 10, 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = make_date(2023, 10, 31);
